leadText: Wind Rider (Japanese: かぜのり Wind Riding) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Wind Rider are immune to damage from wind moves , and their Attack is increased by one stage when hit by one. When Tailwind takes effect on its side or when the Pokémon with Wind Rider is sent into battle while Tailwind is in effect on its side, its Attack is increased by one stage in addition to receiving the speed-boosting effect of Tailwind. Despite being classified as a wind move, Sandstorm , due to the move targeting the field, is the only one that does not interact with Wind Rider at all. Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] Move Type Cat. IX Aeroblast Flying Special ✔ Air Cutter Flying Special ✔ Bleakwind Storm Flying Special ✔ Blizzard Ice Special ✔ Fairy Wind Fairy Special ✔ Gust Flying Special ✔ Heat Wave Fire Special ✔ Hurricane Flying Special ✔ Icy Wind Ice Special ✔ Petal Blizzard Grass Physical ✔ Sandsear Storm Ground Special ✔ Sandstorm Rock Status ✘ Springtide Storm Fairy Special ✔ Tailwind Flying Status ✔ Twister Dragon Special ✔ Whirlwind Normal Status ✔ Wildbolt Storm Electric Special ✔ Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Wind Rider has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Wind Rider are immune to damage from wind moves , and their Attack is increased by one stage when hit by one. When Tailwind takes effect on its side or when the Pokémon with Wind Rider is sent into battle while Tailwind is in effect on its side, its Attack is increased by one stage in addition to receiving the speed-boosting effect of Tailwind. Despite being classified as a wind move, Sandstorm , due to the move targeting the field, is the only one that does not interact with Wind Rider at all.
